summary: Made three surgical seam-polish edits: shifted an opening image away from the draft-board repeat at the chapter boundary, and replaced two calibration-adjacent dialogue lines without changing the chapter's plot, suspicion pattern, or handoff into chapter 5.
edits: Adjusted the opening great-room image so chapter 4 does not re-land on the same draft-board beat that closes chapter 3.
Rephrased Joel's early 'lawyer' line to avoid style-bible calibration overlap while keeping his register and the exchange with Paul intact.
Rephrased Tommy's interview answer about going to bed to avoid near-verbatim calibration-line reuse while preserving his panicked defensiveness.
